info.title: Optimizely CMS REST API - Content
info.description: The Optimizely CMS REST API for Content allows you to define and manage content within your Optimizely CMS environment. This API provides endpoints for creating, retrieving, updating, and deleting content items, as well as managing content types and related definitions. This API uses URL-based versioning (/v1/). Breaking changes will result in a new version. The current version (v1) will be supported for at least 12 months after a new version is released.

get.description: List blueprints using the provided parameters.

parameters.name: pageIndex
parameters.description: Zero based index of the page that should be retrieved.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The maximum items per page that should be retrieved.

requestBody.description: The blueprint that should be created.

ETag.description: The RFC7232 ETag header field in a response provides the current entity-tag for the resource. An entity-tag is an opaque identifier for different versions of a resource over time, regardless whether multiple versions are valid at the same time.

Last-Modified.description: The date and time at which the resource was last modified.

Location.description: Indicates the URL of the newly-created resource.

get.description: Get the blueprint with the provided key.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: The key of the blueprint to retrieve.

parameters.name: If-None-Match
parameters.description: If provided and the value matches the RFC7232 ETag of the current resource a 304 NotModified response will be returned. Weak ETags will always be ignored.

parameters.name: If-Modified-Since
parameters.description: If provided and the resource has not been modified since the date a 304 NotModified response will be returned. This parameter will be ignored if an 'If-None-Match' parameter is also provided.

ETag.description: The RFC7232 ETag header field in a response provides the current entity-tag for the resource. An entity-tag is an opaque identifier for different versions of a resource over time, regardless whether multiple versions are valid at the same time.

Last-Modified.description: The date and time at which the resource was last modified.

ETag.description: The RFC7232 ETag header field in a response provides the current entity-tag for the resource. An entity-tag is an opaque identifier for different versions of a resource over time, regardless whether multiple versions are valid at the same time.

Last-Modified.description: The date and time at which the resource was last modified.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: The key of the blueprint to patch.

parameters.name: If-Match
parameters.description: If provided, the PATCH request will only be considered if the value matches the RFC7232 ETag of the current resource. Weak ETags will always be ignored.

parameters.name: If-Unmodified-Since
parameters.description: If provided, the PATCH request will only be considered if the resource has not been modified since the provided date. This parameter will be ignored if an 'If-Match' parameter is also provided.

requestBody.description: The values of the blueprint that should be patched formatted according to RFC7396.

ETag.description: The RFC7232 ETag header field in a response provides the current entity-tag for the resource. An entity-tag is an opaque identifier for different versions of a resource over time, regardless whether multiple versions are valid at the same time.

Last-Modified.description: The date and time at which the resource was last modified.

parameters.description: The key of the content item to copy.

requestBody.description: Optional instructions for how to copy content.

post.description: Restore the deleted content item with the provided key. If a content item with the provided key is not deleted an error is returned.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: The key of the content item to undelete.

parameters.description: Indicates that the content item should be permanently deleted immediately or if it should be soft deleted first.

parameters.description: The key of the content to retrieve assets for.

parameters.description: Indicates which content types or base types to include in the list.

parameters.name: pageIndex
parameters.description: Zero based index of the page that should be retrieved.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The maximum items per page that should be retrieved.

get.description: List the content items located in a specific container.

parameters.description: The key of the content to retrieve items for.

parameters.name: pageIndex
parameters.description: Zero based index of the page that should be retrieved.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The maximum items per page that should be retrieved.

get.description: List versions of the content with the provided key and locale.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: The key of the content item for which versions should be listed.

parameters.name: locale
parameters.description: The locale of the content item for which versions should be listed.

parameters.name: pageIndex
parameters.description: Zero based index of the page that should be retrieved.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The maximum items per page that should be retrieved.

delete.description: Deletes a branch of the content with the provided key and locale. Returns the published or latest content item in the locale that was deleted. If a content item with the provided key does not exist an error is returned.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: The key of the content item that should be deleted.

parameters.name: locale
parameters.description: The locale that should be deleted for the content item.

get.description: Get the content path with the provided key.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: The key of the content path to retrieve.

parameters.name: pageIndex
parameters.description: Zero based index of the page that should be retrieved.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The maximum items per page that should be retrieved.

get.description: List versions of the content item with the provided key and the provided options.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: The key of the content item for which versions should be listed.

parameters.name: locales
parameters.description: Optional list of locales that should be included. Locale must be a valid IETF BCP-47 language tag. Use 'NEUTRAL' to include locale-neutral content.

parameters.name: statuses
parameters.description: Optional list of status values that versions must have one of to be included.

items.description: Represent the different status values of a content version.

parameters.name: pageIndex
parameters.description: Zero based index of the page that should be retrieved.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The maximum items per page that should be retrieved.

post.summary: Approve the active step of an approval for a content version that is in review. For multi-step approvals, the version remains in review until all steps are approved.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: The key of the content item.

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: The version of the content item.

parameters.name: If-Match
parameters.description: If provided, the POST request will only be considered if the value matches the RFC7232 ETag of the current resource. Weak ETags will always be ignored.

parameters.name: If-Unmodified-Since
parameters.description: If provided, the POST request will only be considered if the resource has not been modified since the provided date. This parameter will be ignored if an 'If-Match' parameter is also provided.

requestBody.description: Options for the approval decision. Use 'force' to bypass the normal approval flow (requires admin access).

ETag.description: The RFC7232 ETag header field in a response provides the current entity-tag for the resource. An entity-tag is an opaque identifier for different versions of a resource over time, regardless whether multiple versions are valid at the same time.

delete.description: Deletes the content item with the provided key and version and returns the deleted item. If a content item with the provided key does not exist an error is returned.

parameters.description: The key of the display template to retrieve.

parameters.name: If-None-Match
parameters.description: If provided and the value matches the RFC7232 ETag of the current resource a 304 NotModified response will be returned. Weak ETags will always be ignored.

parameters.name: If-Modified-Since
parameters.description: If provided and the resource has not been modified since the date a 304 NotModified response will be returned. This parameter will be ignored if an 'If-None-Match' parameter is also provided.

ETag.description: The RFC7232 ETag header field in a response provides the current entity-tag for the resource. An entity-tag is an opaque identifier for different versions of a resource over time, regardless whether multiple versions are valid at the same time.

Last-Modified.description: The date and time at which the resource was last modified.

ETag.description: The RFC7232 ETag header field in a response provides the current entity-tag for the resource. An entity-tag is an opaque identifier for different versions of a resource over time, regardless whether multiple versions are valid at the same time.

Last-Modified.description: The date and time at which the resource was last modified.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: The key of the display template to patch.

parameters.name: If-Match
parameters.description: If provided, the PATCH request will only be considered if the value matches the RFC7232 ETag of the current resource. Weak ETags will always be ignored.

parameters.name: If-Unmodified-Since
parameters.description: If provided, the PATCH request will only be considered if the resource has not been modified since the provided date. This parameter will be ignored if an 'If-Match' parameter is also provided.

requestBody.description: The values of the display template that should be patched formatted according to RFC7396.

ETag.description: The RFC7232 ETag header field in a response provides the current entity-tag for the resource. An entity-tag is an opaque identifier for different versions of a resource over time, regardless whether multiple versions are valid at the same time.

Last-Modified.description: The date and time at which the resource was last modified.

delete.description: Deletes the display template with the provided key.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: The key of the display template to delete.

parameters.name: If-Match
parameters.description: If provided, the DELETE request will only be considered if the value matches the RFC7232 ETag of the current resource. Weak ETags will always be ignored.

parameters.name: If-Unmodified-Since
parameters.description: If provided, the DELETE request will only be considered if the resource has not been modified since the provided date. This parameter will be ignored if an 'If-Match' parameter is also provided.

get.description: List all locales (language branches) available in the CMS.

parameters.name: pageIndex

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The maximum items per page that should be retrieved.

Location.description: Indicates the URL of the newly-created resource.

get.description: Export a CMS content manifest.

parameters.description: The sections that should be included in the manifest export. If not provided, all sections will be included.

parameters.description: Indicates if read-only resources should be included in the manifest export.

parameters.name: cms-ignore-data-loss-warnings
parameters.description: Indicates if manifest resources should be updated even though the changes might result in data loss.

requestBody.description: The manifest that should be imported.

comment.description: An optional comment to include with the approval decision. May be required depending on the approval definition configuration.

force.description: Indicates if the approval should be forced, bypassing the normal approval flow. Requires 'admin' access rights.

ApprovalDecisionOptions.description: Options for approving or rejecting a content version.

type.description: The fundamental data type for the items in the array (e.g., string, integer, content reference).

format.description: The property format that defines specialized handling and validation for this array item.

contentType.description: The content type that items in the array may contain, when the 'type' is set to 'component'.

minimum.description: The minimum value that properties of this type should be able to contain. Value type must match the type of the array item.

maximum.description: The maximum value that array items of this type should be able to contain. Value type must match the type of the array item.

minLength.description: The minimum string length that array items of this type should be able to contain.

maxLength.description: The maximum string length that array items of this type should be able to contain.

pattern.description: Regular expression pattern that limits what strings that array items of this type should be able to contain.

enum.description: A predefined list of allowed values for array items of this type. The enumeration values must match the property's data type. Allowed for string, integer, float and date-time property types.

allowedTypes.description: Defines content and base types that array items of this type may contain.

restrictedTypes.description: Defines content and base types that array items of this type may not contain.

editorSettings.description: Defines editor specific settings for this item. The settings are specific to the item and editor type.

ArrayItem.description: Describes the items of a content type property of type 'array'.

key.description: The unique identifier (key) of the resource.

displayName.description: The display name of this blueprint.

contentType.description: The content type of this blueprint.

created.description: A timestamp indicating when this resource was first created.

createdBy.description: The name of the user or application that created this resource.

lastModified.description: Indicates the last time this resource was modified.

lastModifiedBy.description: The name of the user or application that last modified this resource.

Blueprint.description: Represents a blueprint of a content item.

BlueprintData.description: Represents the data part of a Blueprint.

BlueprintDataPatch.description: Represents the data part of a Blueprint.

items.description: The items in this paged collection.

pageIndex.description: The zero-based index of the current page.

pageSize.description: The number of items in each page. Not necessarily the same as the number of items in this page.

totalCount.description: The estimated total number of items in the collection. May be omitted if the total count is unknown.

BlueprintPage.description: Represents a single page of items in a paged collection, including paging metadata such as the current page index, page size, and an estimated total item count.

displayName.description: The display name of this blueprint.

BlueprintPatch.description: Represents a blueprint of a content item.

displayTemplate.description: The display template that these settings apply to.

settings.description: The display settings of this CompositionNode.

nodeType.description: The node type of this CompositionNode.

layoutType.description: The node layout type of this CompositionNode

nodes.description: The child nodes for this CompositionNode.

contentTypeBinding.description: The binding definition key that controls how the source content item is linked and accessed.

source.description: The reference to the source content item that is being bound. This cannot be empty.

ContentBinding.description: Associates a content item with another source content item, establishing a relationship defined by a content type binding. Used for linking managed content to external or reference content.

contentTypeBinding.description: The binding definition key that controls how the source content item is linked and accessed.

source.description: The reference to the source content item that is being bound. This cannot be empty.

ContentBindingPatch.description: Associates a content item with another source content item, establishing a relationship defined by a content type binding. Used for linking managed content to external or reference content.

reference.description: A reference to the content of this component. Cannot be assigned together with 'contentType' or 'properties'.

contentType.description: The key of the content type that this is an embedded instance of.

reference.description: A reference to the content of this component. Cannot be assigned together with 'contentType' or 'properties'.

contentType.description: The key of the content type that this is an embedded instance of.

properties.description: Properties as they are defined by corresponding component or content type.

ContentData.description: Base structure for content data. Contains properties defined by the content type and optional bindings to source content. Property values must conform to the types defined in the associated ContentType definition.

properties.description: Properties as they are defined by corresponding component or content type.

ContentDataPatch.description: Base structure for content data. Contains properties defined by the content type and optional bindings to source content. Property values must conform to the types defined in the associated ContentType definition.

key.description: The unique identifier (key) of the resource.

container.description: The content item that contains this item in the hierarchy.

owner.description: The content item that owns this item. Content that is owned by another content is also known as an asset. Cannot be combined with container.

contentType.description: The content type that defines the structure and available properties for this item.

primaryLocale.description: The locale for which this content was originally created. This locale will include properties that are shared across all locales.

locales.description: The complete list of locales for which this content has been created for.

lastModified.description: The date and time when this content was last modified.

lastModifiedBy.description: The username of the user that last modified this content.

created.description: The date and time when this content was first created.

createdBy.description: The username of the user who created this content.

deleted.description: If populated, the date and time when this content was deleted.

deletedBy.description: The username of the user who deleted this content. Only populated if the content is deleted.

ContentNode.description: Metadata about a content item in the content hierarchy, including ownership, localization, and audit information. This represents the structural information without the actual property values.

items.description: The items in this paged collection.

pageIndex.description: The zero-based index of the current page.

pageSize.description: The number of items in each page. Not necessarily the same as the number of items in this page.

totalCount.description: The estimated total number of items in the collection. May be omitted if the total count is unknown.

ContentNodePage.description: Represents a single page of items in a paged collection, including paging metadata such as the current page index, page size, and an estimated total item count.

container.description: The content item that contains this item in the hierarchy.

owner.description: The content item that owns this item. Content that is owned by another content is also known as an asset. Cannot be combined with container.

key.description: The unique identifier (key) of the resource.

displayName.description: The display name of this ContentType.

baseType.description: The base type of this ContentType. Ignored for contracts; required for all other content types.

isContract.description: Specifies if the ContentType is a contract type.

source.description: A string that indicates the source of this content type. Can be used to distinguish content types created by the system from types coming from model classes in the CMS solution.

sortOrder.description: A value that is used to when sorting ContentType instances.

mayContainTypes.description: Provides a set of content types that can be created in containers of this type

mediaFileExtensions.description: Provides a set of media file extensions that this content type can handle.

items.description: Represent a Composition behavior for a ContentType.

compositionBehaviors.description: Provides a set of composition behaviors specifying how this content type can be used within compositions. Currently this can only be assigned when baseType is 'component'.

contracts.description: Provides a set of contract content types that this content type is bound to.

created.description: A timestamp indicating when this resource was first created.

createdBy.description: The name of the user or application that created this resource.

lastModified.description: Indicates the last time this resource was modified.

lastModifiedBy.description: The name of the user or application that last modified this resource.

properties.description: Dictionary with all custom properties of this ContentType.

accessRights.description: The access rights assigned to this content type that defines who can create content of this type. If no access rights are assigned, everyone will be able to create content of this type. An empty array means that no new content of this type can be created.

key.description: The unique identifier (key) of the resource.

from.description: Specifies the key of the content type that this binding is from.

to.description: Specifies the key of the content type that this binding is to.

lastModified.description: Indicates the last time this resource was modified.

properties.description: Dictionary with all custom properties of this ContentType.

accessRights.description: The access rights assigned to this content type that defines who can create content of this type. If no access rights are assigned, everyone will be able to create content of this type. An empty array means that no new content of this type can be created.

type.description: The fundamental data type of this property (e.g., string, integer, content reference).

format.description: The property format that defines specialized handling and validation for this property.

contentType.description: The content type key that this property contains when the type is 'component'.

displayName.description: The user-friendly name for this property, displayed in editorial interfaces.

description.description: A description explaining the purpose and usage of this property for content editors.

isLocalized.description: Whether the property value is translated separately for each locale or shared across all locales.

isRequired.description: Whether content items must always provide a value for this property before publication.

group.description: The property group this field belongs to for organizational purposes in the editor. Leave empty to allow automatic grouping.

sortOrder.description: The display order of this property within its group (lower numbers appear first).

indexingType.description: Indicates how this property will be indexed in the search engine. If not explicitly set, the property will be indexed using the default indexing setting of the search engine.

displayMode.description: Indicates how this property is displayed in the editing interface. If not explicitly set, the property will be available for editing.

minimum.description: The lowest value (inclusive) allowed for numeric or date properties. Type must match the property's data type.

maximum.description: The highest value (inclusive) allowed for numeric or date properties. Type must match the property's data type.

enum.description: A predefined list of allowed values for this property. The enumeration values must match the property's data type. Allowed for string, integer, float and date-time property types.

minLength.description: The minimum character length for string-type properties.

maxLength.description: The maximum character length for string-type properties.

pattern.description: Regular expression pattern that limits what value that a string type property must match.

minItems.description: The minimum number of items allowed in array-type properties.

maxItems.description: The maximum number of items allowed in array-type properties.

allowedTypes.description: Content types and base types that this property is permitted to contain. Used by properties of content or content reference type.

restrictedTypes.description: Content types and base types that items in this property are forbidden from containing. Used by properties of content or content reference type.

editorSettings.description: Defines editor specific settings for this property. Editor settings are specific to the item and editor type.

ContentTypeProperty.description: Defines a single property within a content type, including its data type, validation rules, and editorial metadata.

key.description: The key that identifies this content version.

locale.description: The locale of this content version.

version.description: The version identifier of this instance.

variation.description: The variation of this content version, if any. Variations are used to represent different states or forms of the same content item. A variation has its own publishing lifecycle. A variation cannot be published before the default version of same locale has been published.

contentType.description: The content type of this content item.

displayName.description: The display name of this content version.

published.description: Indicates a time when this content was published or should be published.

expired.description: Indicates a time when this content expired or should expire.

status.description: The status of this content version.

delayPublishUntil.description: The timestamp when a scheduled version will be published. Only present when status is 'scheduled'.

routeSegment.description: A string that represents the segment that should be used when routing or generating routes to the current content instance. This value will always be null when content is based on a non-routable content type.

simpleRoute.description: A simple route (shortcut URL) used to access pages and experiences.

ContentVersion.description: Represents a version of a content item.

items.description: The items in this paged collection.

pageIndex.description: The zero-based index of the current page.

pageSize.description: The number of items in each page. Not necessarily the same as the number of items in this page.

totalCount.description: The estimated total number of items in the collection. May be omitted if the total count is unknown.

ContentVersionPage.description: Represents a single page of items in a paged collection, including paging metadata such as the current page index, page size, and an estimated total item count.

version.description: The version identifier of this instance.

variation.description: The variation of this content version, if any. Variations are used to represent different states or forms of the same content item. A variation has its own publishing lifecycle. A variation cannot be published before the default version of same locale has been published.

displayName.description: The display name of this content version.

published.description: Indicates a time when this content was published or should be published.

expired.description: Indicates a time when this content expired or should expire.

status.description: The status of this content version.

delayPublishUntil.description: The timestamp when a scheduled version will be published. Only present when status is 'scheduled'.

routeSegment.description: A string that represents the segment that should be used when routing or generating routes to the current content instance. This value will always be null when content is based on a non-routable content type.

simpleRoute.description: A simple route (shortcut URL) used to access pages and experiences.

ContentVersionPatch.description: Represents a version of a content item.

container.description: Optional key of the container where the copied content should be placed.

owner.description: Optional key of the owner where the copied content should be placed.

editor.description: The suggested editor for this display setting.

sortOrder.description: The sort order of this display setting within the template.

choices.description: The available choices for this display setting.

displayName.description: The display name of this display setting choice.

sortOrder.description: The sort order of this choice within the setting.

displayName.description: The display name of this display template.

nodeType.description: The optional node type this display template is valid for.

baseType.description: The optional base type this display template is valid for.

contentType.description: The optional key of the content type this display template is valid for.

isDefault.description: If this is the default display template for the associated base type, node type or content type.

createdBy.description: The username of the user that created this display template.

pageIndex.description: The zero-based index of the current page.

pageSize.description: The number of items in each page. Not necessarily the same as the number of items in this page.

totalCount.description: The estimated total number of items in the collection. May be omitted if the total count is unknown.

DisplayTemplatePage.description: Represents a single page of items in a paged collection, including paging metadata such as the current page index, page size, and an estimated total item count.

displayName.description: The display name of this display template.

nodeType.description: The optional node type this display template is valid for.

baseType.description: The optional base type this display template is valid for.

contentType.description: The optional key of the content type this display template is valid for.

isDefault.description: If this is the default display template for the associated base type, node type or content type.

settings.description: The available settings for this display template.

DisplayTemplatePatch.description: Describes a display template that can be assigned to content.

value.description: The defined enumeration value. Value type must match the property type.

displayName.description: The display name of the enumeration value.

EnumerationValue.description: Describes one value in an enumeration of possible values.

url.description: The URL that the link points to.

target.description: Specifies how the URL should be displayed in the browsing context (e.g., '_blank' for new window, '_self' for current window).

title.description: The title text or tooltip displayed when hovering over the link.

text.description: The visible text or label displayed to users for this link.

attributes.description: Additional attributes associated with the link.

Link.description: Represents a HTML hyperlink with URL, display text, and optional rendering properties.

key.description: The unique identifier (key) of the resource. This is the IETF BCP-47 language tag (e.g., "en", "en-US", "sv-SE").

displayName.description: The display name of this locale.

isEnabled.description: Indicates whether this locale is enabled and can be used to create content.

routeSegment.description: A string that represents the segment that should be used when routing or generate routes to the current locale

sortOrder.description: A value that is used when sorting locales.

accessRights.description: The access rights assigned to this locale that defines who can create content in this locale. If no access rights are assigned, everyone will be able to create content in this locale. An empty array means that no user will be allowed to create or change content in this locale.

created.description: A timestamp indicating when this locale was first created.

createdBy.description: The username of the user that created this locale.

lastModifiedBy.description: The username of the user that last modified this locale.

Locale.description: Represents a locale that can be used for content.

items.description: The items in this paged collection.

pageIndex.description: The zero-based index of the current page.

pageSize.description: The number of items in each page. Not necessarily the same as the number of items in this page.

totalCount.description: The estimated total number of items in the collection. May be omitted if the total count is unknown.

LocalePage.description: Represents a single page of items in a paged collection, including paging metadata such as the current page index, page size, and an estimated total item count.

displayName.description: The display name of this locale.

isEnabled.description: Indicates whether this locale is enabled and can be used to create content.

routeSegment.description: A string that represents the segment that should be used when routing or generate routes to the current locale

sortOrder.description: A value that is used when sorting locales.

accessRights.description: The access rights assigned to this locale that defines who can create content in this locale. If no access rights are assigned, everyone will be able to create content in this locale. An empty array means that no user will be allowed to create or change content in this locale.

LocalePatch.description: Represents a locale that can be used for content.

locales.description: List of locales that are part of this manifest.

propertyGroups.description: List of content type property groups that are part of this manifest.

contentTypes.description: List of content types that are part of this manifest.

displayTemplates.description: List of display templates that are part of this manifest.

lastModified.description: A timestamp indicating the last time an item included in this manifest was modified.

section.description: The section where the message originated from.

message.description: The message describing an outcome or error.

resource.description: The identifier of the resource that was the reason for this message to be created.

ManifestImportMessage.description: Describes a message from a manifest importing operation.

outcomes.description: List of messages describing the outcome from the manifest import.

errors.description: List of error messages from the manifest import.

ManifestImportResult.description: The result of a manifest import operation.

MediaData.description: Represents media data attached to a content item.

MediaDataPatch.description: Represents media data attached to a content item.

key.description: The key that identifies the content item to be created. If not provided, a new key will be generated.

contentType.description: The content type for the content item to be created.

container.description: The key that identifies the container content where this content item should be created.

owner.description: The key that identifies the owner for the content item to be created. Content that is owned by another content is also known as an asset.

NewContent.description: Represents a new content and the initial data required to create it.

NewContentNode.description: Represents the result of creating a new content item.

application.description: The application that this preview URL is associated with.

url.description: The preview URL (may be relative or absolute).

Preview.description: Represents a preview for a specific application.

items.description: The items in this paged collection.

pageIndex.description: The zero-based index of the current page.

pageSize.description: The number of items in each page. Not necessarily the same as the number of items in this page.

totalCount.description: The estimated total number of items in the collection. May be omitted if the total count is unknown.

PreviewPage.description: Represents a single page of items in a paged collection, including paging metadata such as the current page index, page size, and an estimated total item count.

type.description: A URI reference that identifies the problem type.

title.description: A short, human-readable summary of the problem type.

status.description: The HTTP status code generated by the origin server for this occurrence of the problem.

detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the problem.

instance.description: A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence of the problem. It may or may not yield further information if dereferenced.

code.description: Error code that identifies the problem type.

detail.description: A granular explanation of one specific error related to a field, header or query parameter.

field.description: A string that may provide a hint to which field that was the source of the error.

errors.description: An array of error details with more detailed information about the problem.

oneOf.description: The value is represented as a string when the content type property is defined with type 'string'.
The value is represented as a string in URI format when the content type property is defined with type 'url' or 'contentReference'. Content reference URIs must start with 'cms://content/'.
The value is represented as a string in date-time (RFC 3339) format when the content type property is defined with type 'dateTime'.
The value is represented as a boolean when the content type property is defined with type 'boolean'.
The value is represented as a double precision float number when the content type property is defined with type 'float'.
The value is represented as an integer number when the content type property is defined with type 'int'.

The value is represented as an object when the content type property is defined with type 'component' or 'json'. The schema of the object will vary based on the content type of the referenced content item or the JSON schema used.
The value is represented as a string when the item type is defined as 'string'.
The value is represented as a string in URI format when the item type is defined as 'url' or 'contentReference'. Content reference URIs must start with 'cms://content/'.
The value is represented as a string in date-time (RFC 3339) format when the item type is defined as 'dateTime'.
The value is represented as a boolean when the item type is defined as 'boolean'.
The value is represented as a double precision float number when the item type is defined as 'float'.
The value is represented as an integer number when the item type is defined as 'int'.

The value is represented as an object when the item type is defined as 'component' or 'json'. The schema of the object will vary based on the content type of the referenced content item or the JSON schema used.

value.description: The property value, which can be a string, number, boolean, object, array, or null depending on the property type defined in the content type.

PropertyData.description: A single property value for a content item. The value's type and format are determined by the property definition in the content type schema.

key.description: The unique identifier (key) of the resource.

dataType.description: The underlying data type used for this PropertyFormat.

itemType.description: The underlying item type used for this property format. Specifies the item type when the dataType is 'array'.

displayName.description: The display name of this PropertyFormat.

isDeleted.description: Indicates if this property format has been deleted.

created.description: A timestamp indicating when this display template was first created.

createdBy.description: The username of the user that created this display template.

lastModified.description: A timestamp indicating when this display template was last modified.

lastModifiedBy.description: The username of the user that last modified this display template.

PropertyFormat.description: Represent the definition of semantic property formats for content items.

items.description: The items in this paged collection.

pageIndex.description: The zero-based index of the current page.

pageSize.description: The number of items in each page. Not necessarily the same as the number of items in this page.

totalCount.description: The estimated total number of items in the collection. May be omitted if the total count is unknown.

PropertyFormatPage.description: Represents a single page of items in a paged collection, including paging metadata such as the current page index, page size, and an estimated total item count.

key.description: The unique identifier (key) of the resource.

displayName.description: The display name of this PropertyGroup.

source.description: A string that indicates the source of this property group. Can be used to distinguish property groups created by the system from types coming from model classes deployed to the CMS server.

sortOrder.description: A value that is used to when sorting PropertyGroup instances.

created.description: A timestamp indicating when this property group was first created.

createdBy.description: The username of the user that created this property group.

lastModifiedBy.description: The username of the user that last modified this property group.

PropertyGroup.description: Describes a property group of a ContentType in the CMS.

items.description: The items in this paged collection.

pageIndex.description: The zero-based index of the current page.

pageSize.description: The number of items in each page. Not necessarily the same as the number of items in this page.

totalCount.description: The estimated total number of items in the collection. May be omitted if the total count is unknown.

PropertyGroupPage.description: Represents a single page of items in a paged collection, including paging metadata such as the current page index, page size, and an estimated total item count.

displayName.description: The display name of this PropertyGroup.

sortOrder.description: A value that is used to when sorting PropertyGroup instances.

PropertyGroupPatch.description: Describes a property group of a ContentType in the CMS.

from.description: Specifies the path to the property on the corresponding content type to bind from.

binding.description: Optional binding key that can be used to specify that an already existing binding should be used to map content properties.

PropertyMapping.description: Specifies the binding for a property.

key.description: The key to use for the item in the source. Required if the SourceType is not of type '_Item'.

displayName.description: The key to use for the item in cms. Required if the SourceType is not of type '_Item'.

keyFormat.description: Specifies the format of the source identifier key.

PropertyMappings.description: Represents a mapping between a property in an external source and its corresponding property in the CMS. Used to define how external properties are mapped to CMS property identifiers and names.

displayName.description: The key to use for the item in cms. Required if the SourceType is not of type '_Item'.

keyFormat.description: Specifies the format of the source identifier key.

PropertyMappingsPatch.description: Represents a mapping between a property in an external source and its corresponding property in the CMS. Used to define how external properties are mapped to CMS property identifiers and names.

delayUntil.description: Gets or sets the date and time at which the content should be published, sets the version into 'scheduled' state if a future date is specified.

force.description: Indicates if validations such as approvals and required properties should be bypassed, requires 'admin' access rights.

PublishContentOptions.description: Options for publishing a content version.

comment.description: An optional comment to include when starting the approval process. May be required depending on the approval definition configuration.

ReadyContentOptions.description: Options for transitioning a content version to ready status.

html.description: A HTML representation of the rich text content. May be null to indicate no content.

RichText.description: Represents a rich text content value.

name.description: The unique name of the user, role or application that this identifier references.

type.description: The type of the security entity that this identifier references. Will default to 'role' if not specified.

SecurityIdentity.description: Identifies a user, role or application that can be assigned access associated with a resource.

name.description: The unique name of the user, role or application that this identifier references.

type.description: The type of the security entity that this identifier references. Will default to 'role' if not specified.

SecurityIdentityPatch.description: Identifies a user, role or application that can be assigned access associated with a resource.

Retry-After.description: Indicates how long the client should wait before making a new request.

schema.description: The number of seconds until the client can retry the request.

Prefer.name: Prefer
Prefer.description: Indicates client preference for the response content as per IETF RFC7240. Currently only supports 'return=representation' which can be used to indicate a preference to receive a representation of the resource that has been altered in the response.

SkipValidation.name: cms-skip-validation
SkipValidation.description: Indicates which content validation rules should be bypassed. Supported values are '*' (skip all validations), 'data' (skip data validation), and 'references' (skip reference validation). Values can be combined, empty or duplicated values are ignored, and any unknown values result in a validation error. Use with caution as this may allow creation of invalid content that could cause issues in production.

all.description: This will skip all validation rules. Use with caution as this may allow creation of invalid content that could cause issues in production.

data.description: This will skip data validation rules such as required fields.

reference.description: This will skip reference validation rules such as checking if referenced content exists.

combination.description: This will skip both data and reference validation rules.

AcceptResource.name: cms-accept-resource
AcceptResource.description: Indicates if the client accepts alternative response content in cases when the primary resource is unavailable. Empty and duplicated values are ignored. The order of values is ignored; When both are accepted, inherited resources take precedence over deleted resources. Unknown values are considered invalid.

any.description: Indicates that both inherited and deleted resources may be returned if the primary resource is unavailable.

inherited.description: Indicates that inherited resources may be returned in case the primary resource is unavailable.

deleted.description: Indicates that deleted resources may be returned in case the primary resource is unavailable.

combination.summary: Accept both inherited and deleted resources
combination.description: Indicates that either inherited or deleted resources may be returned in case the primary resource is unavailable. The order of values is ignored as inherited resources always take precedence over deleted resources.

Preference-Applied.description: Indicates which preferences were applied to the response as per IETF RFC7240.

apiAuth.description: Use this scheme to generate an access token that can be used to access the API.

scopes.api:admin: Grants full administrative access to the API

tags.name: Blueprints
tags.description: Operations for managing blueprints that serve as templates for creating new content items with predefined structure and properties.

tags.name: Content
tags.description: Operations for managing content including creating, reading, updating, and deleting content items, versions, and media.

tags.name: ContentSources
tags.description: Operations for managing content sources that define external sources of content.

tags.name: ContentTypeBindings
tags.description: Operations for managing content type bindings that define associations between content types.

tags.name: ContentTypes
tags.description: Operations for managing content type definitions that define the schema of content items.

tags.name: DisplayTemplates
tags.description: Operations for managing display templates that provide rendering instructions for the frontend application.

tags.name: Locales
tags.description: Operations for managing locales that should be available when managing content.

tags.name: Manifest
tags.description: Operations for managing content manifests used to manage content definitions in the CMS.

tags.name: PropertyFormats
tags.description: Operations for retrieving property formats that can be used by content type property definitions.

tags.name: PropertyGroups
tags.description: Operations for managing property groups that are used to organize content type properties.
